mapper.sql: mc.MSG_CONT_ID, mc.MSGR_ID, mc.USER_ID, u.USER_NM, j.JBGD_NM, d.DEPT_NM, mc.CONTENTS, mc.SEND_DT, mc.READ_YN, mc.DEL_YN, mc.MSG_FILE_ID, COALESCE(mc.MSG_TYPE_CD, 'text') AS MSG_TYPE_CD, mc.FORWARD_FROM_MSG_CONT_ID, fwd.CONTENTS AS FORWARD_PREVIEW, fwd_user.USER_NM AS FORWARD_USER_NM, fd.FILE_PATH AS USER_FILE_PATH, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSENGER_USER mu WHERE mu.MSGR_ID = mc.MSGR_ID AND mu.LEFT_DT IS NULL AND mu.USER_ID <> mc.USER_ID AND mu.USER_ID NOT IN ( SELECT mr.USER_ID FROM MESSENGER_READ mr WHERE mr.MSG_CONT_ID = mc.MSG_CONT_ID ) ) AS UNREAD_COUNT

LEFT JOIN USERS u ON mc.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL fd ON u.USER_IMG_FILE_ID = fd.FILE_ID AND COALESCE(fd.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON u.JBGD_CD = j.JBGD_CD LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN MESSENGER_CONTENT fwd ON fwd.MSG_CONT_ID = mc.FORWARD_FROM_MSG_CONT_ID LEFT JOIN USERS fwd_user ON fwd.USER_ID = fwd_user.USER_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT mc
WHERE mc.MSGR_ID = #{msgrId} AND COALESCE(mc.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY mc.SEND_DT ASC

SELECT
FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT mc
WHERE mc.MSGR_ID = #{msgrId} AND COALESCE(mc.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND ( COALESCE(mc.CONTENTS, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(u.USER_NM, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY mc.SEND_DT DESC

SELECT
FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT mc
WHERE mc.MSGR_ID = #{msgrId} AND COALESCE(mc.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY mc.SEND_DT ASC

SELECT
FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT mc
WHERE mc.MSG_CONT_ID = #{msgContId} AND COALESCE(mc.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSENGER_CONTENT ( MSG_CONT_ID, USER_ID, MSGR_ID, CONTENTS, SEND_DT, DEL_YN, READ_YN, MSG_FILE_ID, MSG_TYPE_CD, FORWARD_FROM_MSG_CONT_ID ) VALUES ( #{msgContId}, #{userId}, #{msgrId}, #{contents}, #{sendDt}, #{delYn}, #{readYn}, #{msgFileId}, COALESCE(#{msgTypeCd}, 'text'), #{forwardFromMsgContId} )
mapper.select: SELECT MSG_CONT_ID, USER_ID, MSGR_ID, CONTENTS, SEND_DT, DEL_YN, READ_YN, MSG_FILE_ID, COALESCE(MSG_TYPE_CD, 'text') AS MSG_TYPE_CD, FORWARD_FROM_MSG_CONT_ID FROM MESSENGER_CONTENT
